title: Uttah Electronics marketing site with 3D animated experience (frontend)

requirements.summary: Build a responsive landing-page structure for Uttah Electronics with top navigation and section jump links.
acceptanceCriteria: The site name "Uttah Electronics" appears in the header/nav and on the main hero area.
Layout is responsive and usable on mobile, tablet, and desktop widths.
Navigation links scroll/jump to corresponding sections (or route) without broken links.

file_operations.description: Create the main single-page layout shell with a sticky top navigation, anchored section layout, and wiring to all landing sections so navigation links jump to valid section IDs.
Add a responsive top navigation (brand wordmark + links) that scrolls/jumps to Hero, Categories, Products, About, and Contact sections; ensure the brand name "Uttah Electronics" appears in the nav.
Add a shared layout wrapper to enforce consistent spacing/max-width and responsive section padding across the landing page.

requirements.summary: Add Hero, Featured Categories, Featured Products (static), About, and Contact sections including a functioning client-side contact form interaction.
acceptanceCriteria: Each section is present and visually distinct with headings and body text in English.
Featured Products renders a grid/list of at least 6 sample products (name, short description, price label or "Request quote").
Contact section includes a form UI with fields (Name, Email, Message) and a non-error submit interaction (e.g., client-side confirmation).

file_operations.description: Implement the hero section content (English headline/copy) that includes "Uttah Electronics" prominently, and includes the generated background texture image at frontend/public/assets/generated/uttah-electronics-bg.dim_1920x1080.png.

Create a Featured Categories section with 3–6 coherent electronics categories and consistent cards/tiles. Use shadcn-ui components (e.g., Card/Button) to keep styling consistent. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create a Featured Products section rendering a grid/list of at least 6 sample products (name, short description, and either a price label or "Request quote"). Use shadcn-ui components (e.g., Card/Badge/Button) for product tiles. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Create an About section describing the brand in English with consistent typography and spacing, aligned to the modern electronics theme.

Create a Contact section with a form UI (Name, Email, Message) and a client-side submit confirmation state (no errors on submit). Use shadcn-ui form inputs/buttons where available. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Add a small client-only hook to manage contact form state, basic validation, and success confirmation behavior without backend submission.
Wire all created sections into the single-page layout in the required order and ensure each has a stable anchor ID that matches nav links.

requirements.summary: Add a React Three Fiber (Three.js) 3D hero scene plus an additional animated 3D element/transition, with graceful performance degradation.
acceptanceCriteria: A 3D canvas renders in the hero area and displays a clear electronics-themed 3D scene (e.g., abstract circuit board, rotating device silhouettes, or glowing components).
The 3D scene includes continuous animation (e.g., rotation, subtle floating, animated lights/particles).
The 3D content degrades gracefully on small screens/performance-limited devices (e.g., reduced effects or smaller canvas) without breaking the page.

file_operations.description: Ensure required dependencies for Three.js via React Three Fiber are present (e.g., three, @react-three/fiber, and a helpers package such as @react-three/drei) so the 3D scenes can render in React.
Implement the hero 3D canvas using React Three Fiber with an electronics-themed scene (e.g., stylized circuit traces, glowing nodes, rotating component silhouettes) and continuous animation.
Add an additional animated 3D element used as a section transition/divider (e.g., animated scanning line, particle ribbon, or rotating PCB strip) that is visibly distinct from the hero scene.

Add a hook to detect reduced motion preference and simple device/screen heuristics to reduce canvas effects (lower DPR, fewer particles, simpler materials) on small screens or performance-limited devices.
Embed the HeroScene3D canvas into the hero area and apply graceful fallback behavior (e.g., reduced effects or hiding nonessential 3D layers) based on the reduced-motion/performance hook.
Wire the additional 3D element (SectionDivider3D) into the landing page between appropriate sections to serve as an animated transition effect.

requirements.summary: Define and apply a consistent modern theme across the site using a non-blue/non-purple palette, consistent typography, and component styling.
acceptanceCriteria: A single cohesive theme is applied across navigation, sections, buttons, and typography.
Theme avoids default-looking styling and is consistent across pages/sections.

file_operations.description: Create global styling and theme tokens (CSS variables used by Tailwind/shadcn-ui) using a distinct modern electronics aesthetic that avoids blue/purple dominance (e.g., charcoal + amber/green accents), and set consistent typography/spacing defaults.
Adjust Tailwind theme extensions as needed to support the new palette, typography scale, and consistent section spacing utilities across the site.
Wire the generated favicon asset frontend/public/assets/generated/uttah-electronics-favicon.dim_256x256.png into the document head and ensure the page title remains "Uttah Electronics".

Apply the site theme consistently to navigation (background, borders, link styles, active/hover states) and include the generated wordmark logo frontend/public/assets/generated/uttah-electronics-logo.dim_1024x256.png in the header. Use shadcn-ui components where appropriate (e.g., Button). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Align hero typography, buttons, and background treatment with the global theme and ensure the hero visually matches the rest of the site (including integrating frontend/public/assets/generated/uttah-electronics-bg.dim_1920x1080.png cohesively).
